Client tracker preview for New Wave Swim Team

This page shows how the embedded screenshots fit together as a working Notion setup for New Wave Swim Team: A season tracker for New Wave's coach-operated age-group youth program, built around evaluation requests, location placement across four sites, registration + fees, and practice-gear orders.

What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

Coach Run, Family Supported, coach-operated, athlete-focused, non-profit organization, Evaluations are being held at all sites. Please email ... with your desired location, New swimmers can join for $155 ($180 After August 1). Includes swim cap and team shirts.

Season ops snapshot Registration + roster board Family record (Vasquez family) Registration + site-placement view Season calendar + evaluation window Season closeout + re-enrollment Setup map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • One board for every evaluation request, location/group placement, and registration status — no more juggling four site emails and the New Parent Information Guide PDF.
  • Season calendar tracks the age-group program from evaluation through fee paid, swim cap + team shirt handed out, and first practice across Cary Swim Club, Optimist Park, North Raleigh Christian Academy, and Springdale.
  • Practice-gear and spirit-wear orders live next to the roster so a coach running the whole operation stops re-answering the same parent email.

Evaluation requests, swimmers placed across four sites, $155 on-time registrations paid, swim caps and team shirts handed out — New Wave's age-group season at a glance.

4. Registration + site-placement view

Registration + site-placement view

One panel to see whether the New Parent Information Guide is acknowledged, the swimmer is placed at the right site (Cary Swim Club, Optimist Park, NRCA, or Springdale), and the $155 new-swimmer fee is in.

7. Setup map

Setup map

Six steps: duplicate workspace, import TeamUnify CSV, upload the New Parent Information Guide PDF template, tag the four sites, wire in ncwave@newwaveswimteam.org and (919) 981-0644, share read-only with assistant coaches and parent timers.
